item.title: Her Killer Appeared on TV After the Crime | The Case of Luisa Fernanda Ovalle
item.description: Luisa Fernanda Ovalle’s murder shocked the nation—especially when her killer appeared on television afterward. How did investigators uncover the chilling truth?

media:content.media:title: Her Killer Appeared on TV After the Crime | The Case of Luisa Fernanda Ovalle
media:content.media:description: Luisa Fernanda Ovalle’s murder shocked the nation—especially when her killer appeared on television afterward. How did investigators uncover the chilling truth?

item.title: The Case of 18‑Year‑Old Allison Bonilla
item.description: Allison Bonilla vanished while walking home, leaving her family desperate for answers. What really happened that night, and how was the truth uncovered?

media:content.media:title: The Case of 18‑Year‑Old Allison Bonilla
media:content.media:description: Allison Bonilla vanished while walking home, leaving her family desperate for answers. What really happened that night, and how was the truth uncovered?

item.title: She Turned Him Down — So He Took Her Life | SOLVED Catalina Gutiérrez Part 1
item.description: Catalina Gutiérrez’s rejection led to a shocking act of violence. How did investigators solve the case and bring her killer to justice?

media:content.media:title: She Turned Him Down — So He Took Her Life | SOLVED Catalina Gutiérrez Part 1
media:content.media:description: Catalina Gutiérrez’s rejection led to a shocking act of violence. How did investigators solve the case and bring her killer to justice?

item.title: The unsolved case of Lesly Palacio
item.description: Lesly Palacio's case remains open — and her killer has yet to be brought to justice. A look at what happened, what is known so far, and why this case continues to demand attention. What will it take to bring closure to her family?

media:content.media:title: The unsolved case of Lesly Palacio
media:content.media:description: Lesly Palacio's case remains open — and her killer has yet to be brought to justice. A look at what happened, what is known so far, and why this case continues to demand attention. What will it take to bring closure to her family?

item.title: She Never Made It Home From School!
item.description: A routine walk home turned into a chilling mystery. What happened to the young girl who vanished before reaching her door?

media:content.media:title: She Never Made It Home From School!
media:content.media:description: A routine walk home turned into a chilling mystery. What happened to the young girl who vanished before reaching her door?

item.title: The Case of 11‑Year‑Old Maria Gonzalez
item.description: Maria Gonzalez texted her dad that someone was knocking on the door—then suddenly stopped responding. What chilling events unfolded after that final message?

media:content.media:title: The Case of 11‑Year‑Old Maria Gonzalez
media:content.media:description: Maria Gonzalez texted her dad that someone was knocking on the door—then suddenly stopped responding. What chilling events unfolded after that final message?

item.title: The Case of Lucero Princess Sarabia
item.description: Lucero Princess Sarabia’s story is one of tragedy and unanswered questions. What events led to her fate, and how did investigators piece together the case?

media:content.media:description: Lucero Princess Sarabia’s story is one of tragedy and unanswered questions. What events led to her fate, and how did investigators piece together the case?

item.title: This Is What Happened to 16‑Year‑Old Emely Peguero… So Messed Up!!
item.description: A teenager’s disappearance shocked her community, and the truth was darker than anyone imagined. What really happened to Emely Peguero, and why does her case still haunt so many?

media:content.media:title: This Is What Happened to 16‑Year‑Old Emely Peguero… So Messed Up!!
media:content.media:description: A teenager’s disappearance shocked her community, and the truth was darker than anyone imagined. What really happened to Emely Peguero, and why does her case still haunt so many?
